response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in building scalable systems and has worked with various technologies, including Node.js and TypeScript. They have also demonstrated technical leadership and a strong background in software engineering fundamentals.
strengths: Experience with scalable systems and microservices
Strong background in software engineering fundamentals
concerns: No direct experience in AI-first growth and experimentation systems
Limited experience with C, C++, or Python

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct experience in AI-first growth and experimentation systems
